summary: Comprehensive testing of Stripe Payments and Stories features for Luna Group VIP app. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Fixed frontend routing issue - payment-success and payment-cancelled pages were showing 'Unmatched Route' error. Added missing Stack.Screen routes to _layout.tsx.

fixed_issues.issue: payment-success and payment-cancelled routes not registered in Stack navigator
fixed_issues.fix: Added Stack.Screen entries for payment-success, payment-cancelled, and other missing routes

critical_code_review_comments: All 12 payment packages correctly defined with fixed amounts (security best practice)
Stripe checkout creates real test checkout URLs (sk_test_emergent configured)
Stories API generates AI captions using luna_ai service
Story sharing awards 25 points per share across all platforms
Payment status endpoint properly polls Stripe for payment confirmation
All endpoints properly require authentication (401 without token)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe Payments and Stories features fully tested. Backend: 12 packages (VIP tables, bottle service, points, subscription), checkout creates Stripe sessions, status polling works. Stories: AI caption generation, sharing awards 25 points, feed shows user info. Frontend: Fixed routing issue by adding missing Stack.Screen entries to _layout.tsx. Payment pages now render correctly.

mocked_apis.Stripe: TEST MODE - sk_test_emergent configured, creates real Stripe test checkout URLs
mocked_apis.AI_Features: LIVE - Using Claude API via Emergent LLM Key for story captions

payments_packages.details: Returns 12 packages: 4 VIP tables, 3 bottle service, 3 points, 2 subscription

payments_checkout.details: Creates Stripe checkout session with valid URL, requires auth (401 without token)

payments_status.details: Returns payment status, amount, currency, package_name

stories_create.details: Creates story with AI-generated caption when not provided

stories_my_stories.details: Returns user's stories with id, photo_url, caption, venue_name, shares, created_at

stories_feed.details: Returns public story feed with user info (name, tier)

payment_success_page.details: Renders correctly, polls payment status, shows success/failed state

payment_cancelled_page.details: Renders correctly with Go Back and Return to Home buttons

bug_fixed.cause: Routes not explicitly defined in Stack navigator
bug_fixed.fix: Added Stack.Screen entries for all app routes including payment-success, payment-cancelled, ai-concierge, settings, rewards, etc.
